layoutRegions.name: hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize access-dependent restart status and expose restart packet sealing.

layoutRegions.name: plan-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare service restart plans by owner, outage window, secret dependency, consumer count, and status.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect secret consumers, stale credentials, outage windows, failed restarts, cleanup proof, owner acknowledgements, and rollback packets.

components.name: MetricCard
components.purpose: Show restart plan totals and risk tone with stable dimensions.

components.name: PlanCard
components.purpose: Show an access-dependent restart plan with owner, window, secret dependency, consumer count, status, and progress.
interactions: status chip stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense rows for consumers, outage windows, acknowledgements, and restart packet fields.
interactions: row layout stacks at mobile widths
status labels remain visible without layout shift

components.name: SealRestartPacketButton
components.purpose: Primary action for sealing rollback-safe restart evidence.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states use accent tokens

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
